org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.filechooser

Class AsyncFileLoader

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.support.v4.content.Loader<D>
      • android.support.v4.content.AsyncTaskLoader<List<File>>
        • org.arakhne.afc.ui.android.filechooser.AsyncFileLoader

  •  class AsyncFileLoader
extends android.support.v4.content.AsyncTaskLoader<List<File>>
    Asynchronous loader of a list of files. This loader is watching the file system content to update the list of the files when this list was changed by the action of an other application.
    Version:
    $Name$ $Revision$ $Date$
    Author:
    $Author: galland$
    Maven Group Id:
    $GroupId$
    Maven Artifact Id:
    $ArtifactId$

    • Constructor Detail

      • AsyncFileLoader

        public AsyncFileLoader(android.content.Context context,
               File path,
               FileFilter fileFilter)
        Parameters:
        context - is the execution context of the task.
        path - is the path of the directory to explore.
        fileFilter - is the filter to use.

      • isHiddenFile

        protected boolean isHiddenFile(File file)
        Replies if the given file is hidden in the file chooser.

        file -
        Returns:
        true if hidden; false otherwise.
